connectorUiConfig.title: ContosoFort (Using Blob Container) (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The ContosoFort data connector provides the capability to ingest ContosoFort security event logs into Microsoft Sentinel using ContosoFort Log Export and Azure Blob Storage. Refer to [ContosoFort documentation](https://docs.contosofort.io/log-export) for more information.

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Create a storage account and a container
customs.description: Before configuring ContosoFort log export, first create a storage account and a container in Microsoft Azure. Use [this guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/storage/blobs/storage-blobs-introduction) to learn about Container and Blob storage. Follow the steps in the [documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/storage/common/storage-account-create?tabs=azure-portal) to create an Azure Storage account.

customs.name: Configure ContosoFort Log Export
customs.description: Follow the steps in the [ContosoFort documentation](https://docs.contosofort.io/log-export/azure) to configure log export from ContosoFort to your Azure Blob container.

customs.name: Subscription permissions
customs.description: You need permissions to create the data flow resources: storage queues (notification queue and dead-letter queue), event grid topic and subscription (to send 'blob created event' notifications to the notification queue), and role assignments (to grant access for the Sentinel app to the blob container and the storage queues).

instructionSteps.title: Connect ContosoFort Logs to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description:
To enable ContosoFort logs for Microsoft Sentinel, provide the required information below and click on Connect.
>

parameters.label: The Blob container's URL you want to collect data from
parameters.name: blobContainerUri

parameters.label: The Blob container's storage account resource group name
parameters.name: StorageAccountResourceGroupName

parameters.label: The Blob container's storage account location
parameters.name: StorageAccountLocation

parameters.label: The Blob container's storage account subscription id
parameters.name: StorageAccountSubscription

parameters.label: The event grid topic name of the blob container's storage account if it exists, else leave empty.
parameters.description:
The data flow uses event grid to send 'blob-created event' notifications. There can only be one event grid topic per storage account.
Go to your blob container's storage account and look in the 'Events' section. If you already have a topic, provide its name. Otherwise, leave the text box empty.
parameters.name: EGSystemTopicName
